title: My Brother Forged My Name, Stole Our Parents' $450K, And Evicted Me. So I Let The Law Disbar Him
description: My attorney brother swindled our parents' life insurance, forged my signature, and kicked me out of our family farm. I later became an insurance investigator, uncovered the fraud, and quietly watched the state disbar him while the farmhouse became a thriving organic co-op. #FamilyBetrayal #InsuranceFraud #JusticeServed
thumb_text: HE FORGED MY NAME, NOW HE'S DISBARRED

thumb_lines.text: I BECAME AN INSURANCE INVESTIGATOR, UNCOVERED HIS FORGERY
